name: Lashley, Cohen and Associates
description: Southeastern US industrial automation firm with over 35 years of experience in controls integration, ISO-9001 certified, Rockwell Systems Bronze Partner, serving manufacturing, water/wastewater, food and beverage, chemicals, metals, and building materials.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: knowing help is only a phone call away is a great peace of mind
extremely pleased with the services I have received
They always deliver what they promise

sentiment.summary: Lashley, Cohen & Associates has an exceptional reputation built on professional expertise, reliability, and long-term customer satisfaction across multiple industries.

name: Southern Flow
description: Multi-disciplined control systems and SCADA integrator serving the Southeast and Eastern Seaboard for over 30 years, providing custom SCADA systems with HMI programming and graphic generation.
